author: Nikolai
description: Automatically sort daily notes and files by date in the file explorer. Supports multiple date formats (YYYY-MM-DD, DD.MM.YYYY, DD.MM.YY, MM/DD/YYYY) and flexible folder configuration. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Nick
manifest.description: Automatically sort daily notes and files by date in the file explorer. Supports multiple date formats and flexible folder configuration.
manifest.name: Daily notes sorter

name: Daily notes sorter

releases.author: Reifat
releases.description:
## v1.0.1 - Daily Notes Sorter

### Features
- Automatic sorting of daily notes by date in file explorer
- Support for multiple date formats:
  - `YYYY-MM-DD` (ISO format)
  - `DD.MM.YYYY` (European format)
  - `DD.MM.YY` (European short format)
  - `MM/DD/YYYY` (US format)
  - 
### Changes in 1.0.1
Human-readable dates sort more reliably (fixed locales, strict parsing). Settings path field: stable autocomplete, pick survives blur, empty query lists all folders alphabetically. Tooling aligned with Obsidian 1.1.0+ (ESLint import-x, deps, release runs tests). Jest/Obsidian mock and README updates.
releases.name: 1.0.1 - Daily Notes Sorter

releases.author: Reifat
releases.description:
## v1.0.0 - Daily Notes Sorter

First public release of Daily Notes Sorter plugin.

### Features
- Automatic sorting of daily notes by date in file explorer
- Support for multiple date formats:
  - `YYYY-MM-DD` (ISO format)
  - `DD.MM.YYYY` (European format)
  - `DD.MM.YY` (European short format)
  - `MM/DD/YYYY` (US format)
- Flexible folder configuration with autocomplete
- Toggle sort direction (ascending/descending)
- Real-time path validation
- Notifications for files that don't match date format

### Installation
Download `daily-notes-sorter-1.0.0.zip` and extract to `.obsidian/plugins/daily-notes-sorter/` folder.
releases.name: 1.0.0 - Daily Notes Sorter
